content.text:
## Task: Dark, clean app.css theme (no neon)
## Step: execute

Create src/app.css (it will be copied to wwwroot/dist/app.css by the build). A muted dark theme only — no bright/neon colors. Suggested palette: body background #1e1e1e, text #e6e6e6, panels/dialog #252526, borders #3c3c3c, hover #2d2d30, muted text #9a9a9a, subtle accent link color #6aa6ff (used sparingly). Style at minimum: body (system font stack, margin 0, color/background, font-size 14px); the trigger button `.trigger` (padding, cursor pointer, background #3a3d41, border none, color inherit, border-radius 4px, hover #45494d); the native `<dialog>` via `.browser-dialog` (background #252526, color #e6e6e6, border 1px solid #3c3c3c, border-radius 8px, max-width 960px, width 90vw, padding 16px) and `.browser-dialog::backdrop` (background rgba(0,0,0,0.6)); a header row (flex space-between, title left, close button right); a `.toolbar` (flex wrap gap, breadcrumb `.breadcrumb a` styling, a search `<input>` with dark background #333337 and light text, an upload label styled like a button); a results `<table>` (width 100%, border-collapse, `th`/`td` padding 6px 8px, bottom border 1px solid #3c3c3c, `tbody tr:hover` background #2d2d30, `th` left-aligned muted); folder name rows slightly heavier weight; `.btn` small action buttons (reuse button styling); `.status` footer muted text with counts/sizes; ensure nothing overflows and the table is scrollable if tall (max-height on the results container with overflow:auto). Keep it minimal and clean. Verify: the file exists at src/app.css and will be referenced by index.html as dist/app.css.

content.text:
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2022",
    "module": "ESNext",
    "moduleResolution": "Bundler",
    "strict": true,
    "outDir": "wwwroot/dist",
    "rootDir": "src",
    "sourceMap": true,
    "lib": ["ES2022", "DOM", "DOM.Iterable"],
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "noEmitOnError": true
  },
  "include": ["src/**/*.ts"],
  "exclude": ["src/**/*.test.ts", "node_modules", "wwwroot"]
}
